title: Parzival: A Knightly Epic (vol. 2 of 2)
summaries: "Parzival: A Knightly Epic (vol. 2 of 2)" by Wolfram von Eschenbach is a medieval chivalric romance written in the first quarter of the 13th century. This Arthurian epic follows the hero Parzival's arduous quest for the Holy Grail after his initial failure to achieve it. Raised in ignorance of knighthood, Parzival must learn the ways of chivalry while navigating courtly intrigue, mysterious castles, and spiritual trials. Through themes of humility, compassion, and true love, the narrative explores what it means to become a worthy knight and seeker of the Grail. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
